name: Branch writing
description: Write your ideas in pieces and organize them in a tree. Edit side-by-side with keyboard shortcuts.

name: BackTrack
description: Keeps older versions of your notes so you can rewrite freely. Save once and look back anytime.

name: Nested Notes
description: An improved method to organize notes that doesn't rely on folders but has all the benefits that folders offer without their downsides.

name: Obsidian Plugin Creator
description: Start a plugin project from the official sample template, set up a clean structure, and jump straight to the files where the real work starts.
